headline: Visa’s Role As New Stablecoin Platform Nears Faces Valuation Questions
summary: Visa (NYSE:V), Mastercard, Stripe, and Coinbase are reportedly close to launching a shared stablecoin platform. The project would link traditional payment networks with crypto infrastructure, aiming to support stablecoin-based transactions at scale. This collaboration brings together established card networks and a major crypto exchange and processor on a single payments-focused crypto initiative. For Visa, which currently trades at about $312.4 per share, this development arrives after the...

headline: Visa Announces Asia Pacific Leadership Appointments to Scale Value-Added Services and Southeast Asia Growth
summary: Visa, a global leader in digital payments, today announced two senior leadership appointments in Asia Pacific, reinforcing its focus on scaling Value-Added Services (VAS) and accelerating growth in Southeast Asia. These appointments highlight the depth of leadership talent and reinforce Singapore's position as a key hub for developing senior regional leaders.
